programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of three men changes overnight when they lose all the money they invested in a scam. Now, they must find another way to repay the dreaded loan sharks or face their death.

programme.title: 13B Fear Has A New Address
programme.desc: #N/A

programme.title: Freaky Ali
programme.desc: A sports comedy film that tells the story of a poor man who discovers his natural talent for golf and decides to pursue a career in the sport. With the help of his friend and coach, he enters a tournament to compete against professional golfers and prove himself. The movie highlights themes of determination, hard work, and overcoming social barriers in an entertaining and uplifting plot.

programme.title: Hawaizaada
programme.desc: The film which is based on the life on an Indian scientist Shivkar Bapuji Talpade, who is credited to have constructed India's first unmanned plane is the tale of the hardships that he went through on the journey to discover. Also the film is set in the pre-independence era of Bombay of 1895.
